title: Nord Pool — power market data (day-ahead, intraday, system)
description: Market data from Nord Pool, the Nordic/Baltic power exchange: day-ahead and intraday prices, volumes, capacities and flows, plus operating data (production, consumption, exchange, hydro reservoirs) and balancing-market data. The public data portal shows day-ahead prices in the browser; programmatic and full access is a paid, proprietary data service. EDiT links only; Nord Pool (Euronext group) hosts and licenses the data.

distribution.format: Web data portal + paid REST API (CSV/Excel reports)
distribution.note: Proprietary, mostly PAID data service: annual data fees per feed plus separate redistribution licences, and free access for trading members. IMPORTANT for academic users: Nord Pool states special terms apply for students, researchers and academic entities -- contact them about academic access rather than assuming the commercial tariff. The public portal does display day-ahead prices in the browser. Historical data goes back decades for some regions. See the Power Market Data Services pages for current products, terms and prices.

variables: Day-ahead prices, buy/sell volumes, capacities and flows; intraday trades and orderbooks; operating data (production, consumption, exchange, hydro reservoirs); balancing (mFRR). Per-product field definitions maintained upstream by Nord Pool.
